category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to Eritrea.

target_market_label.zh: 厄立特里亚（无标准机构 / EEC）
target_market_label.zht: 厄利垂亞（無標準機構 / EEC）

title.en: China-to-Eritrea EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入厄立特里亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入厄利垂亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against Eritrea's limited national standards infrastructure, Eritrean Electricity Corporation grid context, IEC 61851 safety expectations, IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 connector direction, OCPP and IEC 61000 EMC evidence, heat and dust derating, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与厄立特里亚有限的国家标准基础设施、厄立特里亚电力公司电网环境、IEC 61851安全预期、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口方向、OCPP及IEC 61000 EMC证据、炎热和粉尘降额，以及中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930基线的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與厄利垂亞有限的國家標準基礎設施、厄利垂亞電力公司電網環境、IEC 61851安全預期、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口方向、OCPP及IEC 61000 EMC證據、炎熱和粉塵降額，以及中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930基線的差距對照。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Eritrea, the honest baseline is uncertainty: Eritrea has no clearly confirmed strong national standards body for EVSE, the EV charging market appears essentially non-existent, and installations should be treated as project-specific electrical infrastructure reviewed with the Eritrean Electricity Corporation or the responsible public authority. Eritrea's low-voltage grid context is commonly 230/400 V at 50 Hz, while China is 220/380 V at 50 Hz, so frequency matches but nominal voltage differs. IEC-family design evidence should be prepared: IEC 61851-1 / -23 safety, IEC 62196 Type 2 for AC and CCS2 for DC, IEC 61000 EMC, OCPP for any networked charger, and heat/dust derating for Horn of Africa conditions. China GB/T 18487.1-2023, GB/T 20234, and GB/T 27930 are useful domestic baselines but are not accepted substitutes for IEC connector and protocol readiness.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入厄立特里亚时，诚实的基线是不确定性：未能确认厄立特里亚存在强有力的电动汽车充电设备国家标准机构，电动汽车充电市场基本尚不存在，安装应作为具体项目电气基础设施，由厄立特里亚电力公司或主管公共机构审查。厄立特里亚低压电网通常为230/400 V、50 Hz，而中国为220/380 V、50 Hz，频率相同但标称电压不同。应准备IEC体系设计证据：IEC 61851-1 / -23安全、交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流CCS2、IEC 61000 EMC、联网充电桩OCPP，以及适用于非洲之角炎热和粉尘环境的降额。中国GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234和GB/T 27930可作为国内基线，但不能替代IEC接口和协议适配。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入厄利垂亞時，誠實的基線是不確定性：未能確認厄利垂亞存在強有力的電動汽車充電設備國家標準機構，電動汽車充電市場基本尚不存在，安裝應作為具體項目電氣基礎設施，由厄利垂亞電力公司或主管公共機構審查。厄利垂亞低壓電網通常為230/400 V、50 Hz，而中國為220/380 V、50 Hz，頻率相同但標稱電壓不同。應準備IEC體系設計證據：IEC 61851-1 / -23安全、交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流CCS2、IEC 61000 EMC、聯網充電樁OCPP，以及適用於非洲之角炎熱和粉塵環境的降額。中國GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234和GB/T 27930可作為國內基線，但不能替代IEC接口和協議適配。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, Eritrea standards determination, EEC grid-connection approval, customs determination, electrical-installation design, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, developers, and installers should verify current Eritrea authority requirements, EEC grid conditions, IEC standard editions, customs requirements, and site-specific electrical rules with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、厄立特里亚标准适用范围裁定、EEC并网批准、海关裁定、电气安装设计或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、开发商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行厄立特里亚主管机构要求、EEC电网条件、IEC标准版本、海关要求及具体场地电气规则。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、厄利垂亞標準適用範圍裁定、EEC併網批准、海關裁定、電氣安裝設計或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、開發商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行厄利垂亞主管機構要求、EEC電網條件、IEC標準版本、海關要求及具體場地電氣規則。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
